name: TextJustification
summary: Specifies enumerated constants used to indicate the internal alignment and justification of text.

enum_values.name: BottomLeft
enum_values.summary: Combination of left justification and bottom alignment.

enum_values.name: BottomCenter
enum_values.summary: Combination of center justification and bottom alignment.

enum_values.name: BottomRight
enum_values.summary: Combination of right justification and bottom alignment.

enum_values.name: MiddleLeft
enum_values.summary: Combination of left justification and middle alignment.

enum_values.name: MiddleCenter
enum_values.summary: Combination of center justification and middle alignment.

enum_values.name: MiddleRight
enum_values.summary: Combination of right justification and middle alignment.

enum_values.name: TopLeft
enum_values.summary: Combination of left justification and top alignment.

enum_values.name: TopCenter
enum_values.summary: Combination of center justification and top alignment.

enum_values.name: TopRight
enum_values.summary: Combination of right justification and top alignment.
